output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?athlete ?athleteLabel(COUNT(?medal) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?athlete wdt:P31 wd:Q5 ; wdt:P126 ?medal .
  ?medal wdt:P1680 wd:Q61453 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?athlete rdfs:label ?athleteLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?athleteLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
GROUP BY ?athlete ?athleteLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
